title: SmooHUD Dark
description: A smooth and colour-consistent HUD rework, using a dark colour scheme
body:
# SmooHUD Dark

SmooHUD (Smooth HUD) Dark transforms your HUD and makes it smooth and cohesive, using a dark and consistent colour scheme with as few (shades of) colours as possible to keep it simple and smooth.

As of v1.1, SmooHUD has support for [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin).

Attribute icons are also changed to be more colourful/contrasting and smooth.

This is the Dark version of SmooHUD, and currently this is the only version. SmooHUD will most likely be made available in more colour schemes in the future when I have time. I intend, but do not promise to at least release a Grey and Light (white) version of SmooHUD.

SmooHUD isn't the only SmooPack available. See below for SmooPacks that alter other parts of the GUI.

## SmooPacks

Check out all currently available SmooHUDs in the [SmooHUD Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/R1YmDDaC).

You can also download only the selected slot texture as a standalone resource pack by downloading any of the [SmooHUD Selector Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/eRZkOenV). This will become useful only if and once I add more colour schemes, as then you'll be able to mix and match colours.

If you want to have a smooth options background, download any of the [SmooBack Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/VZGPEYKa).

If you want to overhaul the rest of your GUI in the same style as SmooHUD, download any of the [SmooGUI Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/QRoetCy4).
